description: Unique identifier for each ad impression
sample_query: SELECT impression_id FROM ad_impressions WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURRENT_DATE()

description: Anonymized user identifier
sample_query: SELECT user_id FROM ad_impressions WHERE device_type = 'mobile'

description: Time when ad was shown to user in UTC
sample_query: SELECT DATE(timestamp) as date FROM ad_impressions GROUP BY 1

description: Unique ad creative identifier
sample_query: SELECT ad_id FROM ad_impressions WHERE placement = 'home_feed'

description: Where the ad was displayed to user
sample_query: SELECT placement FROM ad_impressions GROUP BY placement

description: Device category
sample_query: SELECT device_type FROM ad_impressions WHERE user_id = 'user_123'

description: Unique identifier for each ad click event
sample_query: SELECT click_id FROM ad_clicks WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURRENT_DATE()

description: Foreign key linking to ad_impressions table
sample_query: SELECT i.ad_id FROM ad_clicks c JOIN ad_impressions i ON c.impression_id = i.impression_id

description: Time when user clicked the ad in UTC
sample_query: SELECT timestamp FROM ad_clicks WHERE click_id = 'clk_123'

description: Unique conversion event identifier
sample_query: SELECT conversion_id FROM conversions WHERE conversion_type = 'purchase'

description: User who completed the conversion
sample_query: SELECT user_id FROM conversions WHERE conversion_value > 100

description: Last-click attribution to ad click
sample_query: SELECT c.click_id FROM conversions cv JOIN ad_clicks c ON cv.attributed_click_id = c.click_id

description: Type of conversion action
sample_query: SELECT conversion_type FROM conversions GROUP BY conversion_type

description: Monetary value of the conversion in USD
sample_query: SELECT SUM(conversion_value) FROM conversions WHERE DATE(timestamp) = CURRENT_DATE()

description: Days between click and conversion
sample_query: SELECT AVG(attribution_window_days) FROM conversions WHERE conversion_type = 'purchase'

description: Reporting date for aggregated metrics
sample_query: SELECT date FROM metrics_daily WHERE campaign_id = 'campaign_123'

description: Campaign identifier for grouping metrics
sample_query: SELECT campaign_id FROM metrics_daily WHERE impressions > 100000

description: Total ad impressions for the day
sample_query: SELECT SUM(impressions) FROM metrics_daily WHERE date BETWEEN '2024-05-01' AND '2024-05-17'

description: Total ad clicks for the day
sample_query: SELECT SUM(clicks) FROM metrics_daily WHERE campaign_id = 'campaign_123'

description: Click-through rate calculated as clicks divided by impressions
sample_query: SELECT AVG(ctr) FROM metrics_daily WHERE date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE() INTERVAL 7 DAY)

description: Total attributed conversions for the day
sample_query: SELECT SUM(conversions) FROM metrics_daily WHERE date = CURRENT_DATE()

description: Conversion rate calculated as conversions divided by clicks
sample_query: SELECT campaign_id FROM metrics_daily WHERE conversion_rate > 0.05

description: Return on ad spend calculated as revenue divided by cost
sample_query: SELECT AVG(roas) FROM metrics_daily WHERE campaign_id = 'campaign_123'

description: Total ad spend in USD for the day
sample_query: SELECT SUM(spend) FROM metrics_daily WHERE date BETWEEN '2024-05-01' AND '2024-05-17'

description: Anonymized user identifier
sample_query: SELECT user_id FROM user_profiles WHERE segment = 'high_value'

description: When user created their account
sample_query: SELECT registration_date FROM user_profiles WHERE country = 'US'

description: User's country code
sample_query: SELECT country FROM user_profiles GROUP BY country

description: Predicted lifetime value in USD from ML model
sample_query: SELECT AVG(ltv_predicted) FROM user_profiles WHERE segment = 'high_value'

description: User behavioral segment from clustering model
sample_query: SELECT segment FROM user_profiles WHERE ltv_predicted > 500
